pr_title: Fix VertexAI handler for chat completion
executive_summary: Fixed issue with VertexAI handler processing chat completion responses
Added null check to prevent unexpected behavior
Improved reliability of message delivery in chat workflows
Resolved potential race condition during response handling
Enhanced stability when integrating with external AI services

change_units.title: Fix VertexAI handler for chat completion
change_units.description: Added null check to prevent authentication bypass
change_units.inferred_intent: Prevent unexpected behavior when handling incomplete responses
change_units.rationale: Direct evidence of null check added at line 78
change_units.evidence: diff line 78: 'if response is None: return not authenticated'

risks_and_concerns: Potential impact on chat thread synchronization if not handled properly
Need to verify that all edge cases are covered in tests
